title: Greek-Style Crispy Pork Shoulder Roast
description: A deliciously crispy pork shoulder roast with a bitter twist, inspired by Greek flavors.
instructions: Season the pork shoulder roast with Greek seasoning, salt, and black pepper.
In a separate pan, heat the olive oil over medium-high heat.
Sear the pork shoulder roast until browned on all sides, about 2-3 minutes per side.
Transfer the pork shoulder roast to a baking sheet.
If using bitter melon, slice it thinly and arrange it around the pork shoulder roast.
Sprinkle the crispy coating evenly over the pork shoulder roast and bitter melon.
Roast in the preheated oven for about 20-25 minutes per pound, or until the internal temperature reaches 145°F (63°C).
Let the pork shoulder roast rest for 10 minutes before slicing and serving.
